cleavage agent: digestion of eluted glycoproteins with endoproteinase Glu-C
collision energy: collision energies ranging from 17 to 40 eV
enrichment method: we chose Con A, a commonly used lectin which preferentially recognizes glycans
fragmentation method: tuning energy stepping collision induced dissociation of glycopeptides
instrument: coupled to Compact Q-TOF mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled to the MS using CaptiveSpray ESI interface
labeling: glycans are more and more being considered as biomarkers of various diseases.
